issue: nom build .#health-checks fails: mod 'distanthorizons' not in modCatalog
trigger: examples/minecraft/crazy-terrain references distanthorizons (version 1.21.11) but catalog 1.21.11.json doesn't contain it
root_cause: Commit 44fc009 added 'distanthorizons' to images/games/minecraft/mods/manifest.json under version 1.21.11 but did not regenerate images/games/minecraft/mods/1.21.11.json. Manifest and generated catalog drifted.
hypothesis: Running `nix run .#update-mods -- --version 1.21.11` will regenerate the 1.21.11.json catalog with distanthorizons entries, fixing the eval error.
fix: Run the updater, then verify with `nix build .#health-checks`.
